---
species: "Crossaster papposus"
accepted_code: "CRPA"
alternate_codes: ""
diminutive: "CRPAS"
alternate_diminutives: ""
common_name: "Common/spiny sun star"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "10-12 arms with large central disc"
image: '/header_images/crossaster_papposus.jpg'
image_credit: 'Photo by Neil McDaniel via [WORMS](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=image&pic=116434&tid=124154)'
categories:
  - sea stars
sampling_programs:
    - keen_quad
    - keen_swath
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - mobile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: "124154"
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 
<!-- size, gross morphology, a key identifier, zonation notes (intertidal or depth) -->
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

<!-- link to worms page -->
